summary: Completed frontend testing of ExitReadinessCard circular progress ring bug fix. All 8 test features verified working correctly - no visible gap at bottom, ring starts at 12 o'clock, progress clockwise, smooth rounded caps.
passed_tests: ExitReadinessCard - circular progress ring has no visible gap at bottom (strokeDasharray format '${circumference} ${circumference}' verified)
ExitReadinessCard - ring starts at top (12 o'clock) with inline style transform: 'rotate(-90deg)' verified
ExitReadinessCard - progress is clockwise (confirmed with -90deg rotation + strokeDashoffset)
ExitReadinessCard - strokeLinecap='round' for smooth caps verified on progress circle
ExitReadinessCard - strokeDashoffset calculation correct: circumference * (1 - progress) = 156.828px for 52%
ExitReadinessCard - visually symmetrical ring display verified
critical_code_review_comments: SVG progress ring implementation is correct and follows best practices
Using inline style transform instead of Tailwind class for rotation is appropriate
strokeDasharray format '${circumference} ${circumference}' correctly ensures no gap at endpoints
Gradient direction (y-axis: 0% to 100%) works correctly with -90deg rotation

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all 8 circular progress ring tests passed
